resultList.plgdtldesc: Presenting a premium living experience in the rapidly evolving corridor of Sector 103, Gurgaon, this spacious 3 BHK apartment in the prestigious Godrej Vrikshya development offers a perfect blend of modern architecture, comfort, and future-ready infrastructure. The thoughtfully planned layout comprises three well-appointed bedrooms, three bathrooms, and two balconies, ensuring ample space for comfortable family living. The living and dining areas are seamlessly combined, creating a spacious and inviting environment. A modular kitchen equipped with a chimney and piped gas connection enhances everyday functionality. The interiors are finished with elegant Italian marble flooring, adding a luxurious touch to the overall ambience. The apartment is north-facing and Vastu compliant, making it appealing for traditional preferences. Additionally, the inclusion of house help accommodation adds to the practicality of the home.FacilitiesResidents of this development benefit from a host of modern amenities designed to elevate everyday living. The project also features air-conditioned spaces and a theme-based architectural design, reflecting contemporary lifestyle standards within a well-planned residential community.LocalityStrategically located in Sector 103, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to key parts of Gurgaon and Delhi. Reputed educational institutions such as Prime Scholar School are within approximately 500 metres, while hospitals are accessible within 3 km, ensuring convenience for families. The railway station lies around 6 to 7 km away, and metro connectivity is available within a radius of approximately 12 km. The surrounding area is supported by supermarkets, banks, ATMs, and other essential services, making daily life seamless. With its proximity to major road networks and growing infrastructure, Sector 103 continues to emerge as a desirable residential destination in Gurgaon.

resultList.plgdtldesc: This premium 3 BHK apartment offers a fantastic opportunity for homebuyers seeking a blend of high-end urban living and central connectivity. Situated in DLF Capital Greens, a highly prestigious and beautifully designed residential township in Moti Nagar, New Delhi, this property provides a sophisticated and comfortable home. Positioned on a middle floor of a magnificent 26-storey high-rise tower, the residence benefits from an elevated vantage point and excellent ventilation. The immediate neighbourhood features a highly developed social infrastructure, placing reputed educational institutions like the Model Vidya Bhavan School and the Ambedkar University Delhi Karampura Campus within close proximity. Comprehensive healthcare facilities, such as the Life Care Institute, along with prominent retail markets, dining establishments, and banking institutions, are all easily accessible, making this an ideal neighbourhood for modern urban living.
